metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the travel-accommodations-marketplace domain.

bricks.name: Marketplace Home & Destination Landing
bricks.description: Primary traveler entry surfaces for destination inspiration, recent-search recall, campaign landings, and high-intent jump-off into stays discovery.

internalModules.title: Landing Experience Shell
internalModules.description: Composes home, destination, and campaign entry experiences across web and app.

internalModules.title: Session Recall and Intent Recovery
internalModules.description: Restores recent searches, trip context, and account-aware shortcuts.

internalModules.title: Merchandising Slot Orchestration
internalModules.description: Places editorial, commercial, and destination modules in entry surfaces.

interfaces.title: Traveler Entry UI
interfaces.description: Web and mobile entry experience for trip discovery.

interfaces.title: Landing Assembly API
interfaces.description: API used to assemble home and destination landing content.

interfaces.title: Journey Event Stream
interfaces.description: Captures destination-entry and merchandising interaction signals.

brickDependencies.description: Uses destination context to build landing experiences.
Uses recommendations to personalize destination entry surfaces.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Consumes campaign and acquisition context for tailored entry experiences.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Traveler clients use the home and landing experiences as the main marketplace entry point.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Marketplace Home Destination Landing.
Reads Destination Discovery to support domain workflows.
Reads Search Ranking Filters to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Destination Discovery
bricks.description: Destination entry, inspiration, map context, and landing surfaces that move travelers from broad trip intent into accommodation search.

internalModules.title: Destination Context Graph
internalModules.description: Builds place, district, landmark, and event context for travel discovery.

internalModules.title: Travel Intent Resolution
internalModules.description: Converts destination and date intent into searchable marketplace parameters.

internalModules.title: Destination Experience Layer
internalModules.description: Renders destination overviews, nearby areas, and next-step entry points.

interfaces.title: Destination Discovery UI
interfaces.description: Traveler-facing destination exploration experience.

interfaces.title: Destination Metadata API
interfaces.description: API surface for place and market discovery context.

interfaces.title: Destination Signal Feed
interfaces.description: Event stream carrying destination-demand and interaction signals.

brickDependencies.description: Uses geo, market, and localization data to represent destinations correctly.
Hands high-intent destination context into search and ranking.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Destination Discovery.
Reads Marketplace Home Destination Landing to support domain workflows.
Reads Search Ranking Filters to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Search, Ranking & Filters
bricks.description: Accommodation search, filtering, sorting, map browsing, and ranking across traveler and policy intent.

internalModules.title: Search Index and Facet Engine
internalModules.description: Builds and serves searchable property, room, policy, and amenity facets.

internalModules.title: Ranking and Eligibility Pipeline
internalModules.description: Combines relevance, quality, commercial, and traveler-context signals to order supply.

internalModules.title: Filter and Explainability Controls
internalModules.description: Supports traveler filters, operator tuning, and ranking explanation surfaces.

interfaces.title: Search Experience UI
interfaces.description: Primary traveler interface for searching and filtering stays.

interfaces.title: Search and Ranking API
interfaces.description: API used by traveler and partner surfaces to query ranked accommodation inventory.

interfaces.title: Inventory Update Feed
interfaces.description: Ingestion feed for availability, content, and commercial updates affecting search.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on live rate and availability state.
Consumes commercial, quality, and demand signals.
Uses eligible offer treatments when ranking and presenting results.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Relies on scalable search infrastructure to serve high-volume discovery use cases.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Traveler clients depend on search and ranking to surface relevant stays.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Search Ranking Filters.
Reads Traveler Account Wallet to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Map-Based Stay Browser
bricks.description: Map-centric browse experience for neighborhood, landmark, and travel-radius decisions where location quality matters as much as property quality.

internalModules.description: Serves map geometry, viewport context, and geo overlays for marketplace browse flows.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Transaction to support domain workflows.
